content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Reviewed the producer metadata change set end-to-end in `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/mod.rs`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/panel_contracts.rs`, checked the touched tests, and ran `cargo test --quiet`. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the submitted changes.

## Amendments

None.
